org.arakhne.afc.ui.android.zoom

Class DroidZoomableGraphics2D

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.afc.ui.vector.AbstractVectorGraphics2D
      • org.arakhne.afc.ui.android.zoom.DroidZoomableGraphics2D
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    VectorGraphics2D, ZoomableContext
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    DroidViewGraphics2D

    public class DroidZoomableGraphics2D
extends AbstractVectorGraphics2D
implements ZoomableContext
    This is the droid-based implementation of a VectorGraphics2D and a ZoomableContext.
    Version:
    $Name$ $Revision$ $Date$
    Author:
    $Author: galland$
    Maven Group Id:
    $GroupId$
    Maven Artifact Id:
    $ArtifactId$

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      protected Color background
      Current background color.
      protected android.graphics.Canvas canvas
      Android canvas.
      protected CenteringTransform centeringTransform
      Transformation to apply to center the objects on the view.
      protected Color defaultBackground
      Default color to draw the background.
      protected Color defaultFillColor
      Default color to fill the shapes.
      protected Graphics2DLOD defaultLevelOfDetail
      Default Level-of-Detail.
      protected Color defaultLineColor
      Default color to outline the shapes.
      protected android.graphics.Paint fillPainter
      Android painter to use for filling the shapes.
      protected float focusX
      Coordinate of the point that is drawn at the center of the view.
      protected float focusY
      Coordinate of the point that is drawn at the center of the view.
      protected android.graphics.Paint fontPainter
      Android painter to use for drawing the texts.
      protected Graphics2DLOD levelOfDetail
      Current Level-of-Detail.
      protected android.graphics.Paint linePainter
      Android painter to use for drawing the outlines of the shapes.
      protected float maxScale
      Maximal value for the scale factor.
      protected float minScale
      Minimal value for the scale factor.
      protected float scale
      Scaling factor to apply when drawing.
      protected float scalingSensitivity
      Scaling sensitivity.
      protected Rectangle2f tmpRect
      Temp rectangle used in internal computations.

    • Constructor Detail

      • DroidZoomableGraphics2D

        public DroidZoomableGraphics2D(android.graphics.Canvas canvas,
                       Color defaultFillColor,
                       Color defaultLineColor,
                       float scaleFactor,
                       CenteringTransform centeringTransform,
                       Color background,
                       boolean isAntiAlias,
                       float scalingSensitivity,
                       float focusX,
                       float focusY,
                       float minScaleFactor,
                       float maxScaleFactor)
        Parameters:
        canvas -
        defaultFillColor - is the default color for filling.
        defaultLineColor - is the default color for the lines.
        scaleFactor - is the scaling factor to apply.
        centeringTransform - is the transformation used to draw the objects at the center of the view.
        background - is the background color.
        isAntiAlias - indicates if antialiasing is used when drawing.
        scalingSensitivity - is the sensitivity of the scaling actions.
        focusX - is the coordinate of the focus point.
        focusY - is the coordinate of the focus point.
        minScaleFactor - is the minimal allowed scaling factor.
        maxScaleFactor - is the maximal allowed scaling factor.

    • Method Detail

      • convertMatrix

        public static Transform2D convertMatrix(android.graphics.Matrix m,
                        float scale)
        Convert the droid matrix to Arakhne transformation matrix.
        Parameters:
        m - is the matrix to convert to a transformation.
        scale - is the scaling factor to apply.
        Returns:
        the Arakhne transformation matrix.

      • convertTransformation

        public static android.graphics.Matrix convertTransformation(Transform2D t,
                                            float scale)
        Convert the Arakhne transformation matrix to droid matrix.
        Parameters:
        t - is the transformation to convert to a matrix.
        scale - is the scaling factor to apply.
        Returns:
        droid matrix.

      • setColor

        protected static void setColor(android.graphics.Paint paint,
            Color color)
        Set the color of the given paint to the given color. This function tries the Android color objects that are able to represent a color (ARGB color, Drawable).
        Parameters:
        paint -
        color -
